note: Crafts of the Gearlands/Numinous Reach (mechanical_spiritual axis) — the axis whose deep peak is What Sleeps Under. Enginecraft is the mechanical-pole tradition (Precursor arts at their most technical); Numenwork the spiritual-pole (the mystic disciplines the framework keeps converging toward). Learned by traveling the Reach or training with Enginewrights/the Numinous. Both drift the wielder toward their pole; the doubly-charged Forge of Ends is where they meet. Distinct from precursor.json: Precursor is the Valley's dangerous folk-access to the deep; these are the Reach's true traditions. axes signed for engine compat. Authored by Aevi (PO), SNG-016.

abilities.name: Enginecraft
abilities.narrationHints: Mechanism as a language spoken fluently — systems built, run, and understood at a depth the Valley's tinkers only gesture at.
abilities.description: The mechanical-pole mastery: design, run, and command machine-systems, Precursor works included, at the Enginewrights' depth.
abilities.notFor: The numinous/meaning side of a Precursor site (that's Numenwork); life or growth; anything that must be felt rather than built.

tree.name: The Wright's Eye
tree.grants: Understand any mechanism's design and purpose on study; build reliable machines and devices; run Precursor systems that Latticespeak could only ask.
tree.cannot: Understanding function is not understanding WHY it was made; live-hostile systems still resist.

tree.name: System-Speaker
tree.grants: Command a machine-system to reconfigure toward your intent; chain devices into working wholes; repair or repurpose Precursor works at the component level.
tree.cannot: The system does what its mechanism allows, not what you wish; the numinous layer stays opaque — you move the body, not the meaning.

tree.name: Master of the Works
tree.grants: Command machine-country — a whole Precursor installation bent toward a purpose; wake or still a mechanical site at scale; build engines that outlive you. The Great Engine's power in miniature.
tree.cannot: The wielder drifts hard-mechanical; a person who becomes all-Engine forgets why anything is FOR — the framework's foreclosure by another road; and the Great Engine notices a rival wright.

abilities.name: Numenwork
abilities.narrationHints: The disciplines of pure meaning — attention made a force, presence that changes what it attends to, the material world going briefly negotiable.
abilities.description: The spiritual-pole mastery: the mystic practices where meaning acts directly on the world. The road the Valley's framework keeps recognizing itself in.
abilities.notFor: Building or commanding mechanism (that's Enginecraft); forcing an outcome (Numenwork attends, it does not compel); anything that treats spirit as a lever.

tree.name: True Attention
tree.grants: Attend so fully that the truth of a person, place, or moment surfaces; steady a soul in crisis by presence alone; perceive the meaning-layer of a Precursor site the Engine can't reach.
tree.cannot: Attention reveals and steadies; it does not command or coerce; the unwilling can close to it.

tree.name: The Negotiable World
tree.grants: Where meaning is dense, the material softens — a symbol made briefly real, a threshold held open by significance, a wound that was always metaphor healed as one. Read the numinous truth of the deep works.
tree.cannot: Only where meaning already runs dense; it bends the world, never breaks it; the price is proportional to the bending.

tree.name: The Standing Presence
tree.grants: Attention as a force that holds — keep a foreclosing thing open by significance alone, hold a truth in a place until it can't be unsaid, meet the numinous heart of What Sleeps Under as an equal rather than a trespasser. The Numen's power in miniature; the framework's 'hold the aperture' made a discipline.
tree.cannot: The wielder drifts hard-spiritual, toward leaving the material behind entirely; presence holds, it does not decide; what you hold open, others must walk through.

abilities.name: Mechanism-Sense
abilities.narrationHints: The workings of a thing felt like a diagram behind the eyes.
abilities.description: Perceive how a mechanism or system functions on sight.
abilities.notFor: The why/meaning of it; living things.

tree.name: Mechanism-Sense
tree.grants: Understand a device or machine-system's function and flaws at a glance.
tree.cannot: Function, not purpose; the numinous stays dark.

tree.name: The Whole Mechanism
tree.grants: Read a machine entire — what it does, what it was FOR, where it will fail, and what someone changed.
tree.cannot: It reads mechanism. What a machine MEANS is the Numinous's country, not yours.

tree.name: The Engine's Confession
tree.grants: A mechanism tells you its whole history — every hand that touched it, every misuse, every repair made in a hurry.
tree.cannot: The Precursor works do not confess. They only answer, and only sometimes.

abilities.name: Numen-Sense
abilities.narrationHints: The weight of meaning in a place felt on the skin.
abilities.description: Sense where meaning runs dense — sacred ground, a charged moment, a numinous site.

tree.name: Numen-Sense
tree.grants: Feel the significance-density of a place or moment; know where the world is 'thin.'
tree.cannot: Feel, not command; barren places read empty.

tree.name: The Thinning
tree.grants: Feel where the veil is thin — where meaning presses close enough to touch, and where something is pressing back.
tree.cannot: Feeling the thin place is not surviving it. Not everything on the other side is glad to be noticed.

tree.name: The Numen Plain
tree.grants: The numinous is simply visible to you — the sacred, the haunted, the charged, all plain as furniture.
tree.cannot: Once seen, never unseen. The Numinous who reach this depth find the ordinary world thin and hard to care about.

abilities.name: Mend
abilities.narrationHints: Parts find their places and the dead thing hums again.
abilities.description: Repair a broken mechanism or device with a craftsman's sure touch.

tree.name: Mend
tree.grants: Fix a broken tool, machine, or simple device reliably.
tree.cannot: Ordinary mechanism only; the deep works resist.

tree.name: The True Mend
tree.grants: Mend a thing so it works as it was meant to — not patched, but restored to its intent.
tree.cannot: You must know what it was FOR. A mend against the true intent will not hold.

tree.name: Better Than New
tree.grants: The mended thing is better than it was — you understood it well enough to improve it in the mending.
tree.cannot: The Enginewrights' pride and their sin: not everything you can improve should be.

abilities.name: Steady the Soul
abilities.narrationHints: Presence alone, and the breaking person holds.
abilities.description: Steady another's spirit in crisis by attention and presence — folk-Numenwork.

tree.name: Steady the Soul
tree.grants: Calm and steady a person in spiritual/emotional crisis through pure presence.
tree.cannot: Opens the door, never shoves; the closed resist.

tree.name: The Steadied Hand
tree.grants: Steady another person through terror, grief, or the shakes — they can act when they could not.
tree.cannot: Steadying is a loan against their own strength. It comes due when you let go.

tree.name: The Unshaken
tree.grants: Nothing shakes you, and nearness to you steadies others without effort — panic does not propagate through you.
tree.cannot: Unshakable is not unhurt. It means the hurt does not show, and does not get put down.

abilities.name: Command the Small Engine
abilities.narrationHints: A word to the machine and it does the new thing.
abilities.description: Direct a machine-system to reconfigure toward your intent — mid-tier Enginecraft.
abilities.notFor: The meaning-layer; wishes the mechanism can't do.

tree.name: Command the Small Engine
tree.grants: Make a device or system do something within its mechanism it wasn't set to.
tree.cannot: Only what the mechanism allows; meaning stays opaque.

tree.name: The Larger Engine
tree.grants: Command engines beyond the small — a mill, a lock-system, a Precursor door that still half-listens.
tree.cannot: Commanding a thing is not understanding it. Engines obey the words, not the wish.

tree.name: The Engine Obeys
tree.grants: Mechanism answers you as if you were its maker — it does what you mean, not merely what you say.
tree.cannot: Halvex Coil began exactly here, and did not stop. The Enginewrights teach this rank with a warning attached.

abilities.name: Open the Thin Place
abilities.narrationHints: Where meaning is thick, a threshold opens that was never a door.
abilities.description: Where significance runs dense, briefly make a symbol real — a threshold held by meaning. Mid-tier Numenwork.
abilities.notFor: Where meaning is thin; forcing the world.

tree.name: Open the Thin Place
tree.grants: In a meaning-dense place, make a symbol briefly literal — a held threshold, a metaphor made real.
tree.cannot: Only where meaning is dense; costs proportional.

tree.name: The Held Thin Place
tree.grants: Hold a thin place open — long enough for others to see, to speak, to pass a thing through.
tree.cannot: Held open is held open from BOTH sides. Whatever is on the other side also has a door now.

tree.name: The Open Door
tree.grants: Open a thin place where there was none, in a room that had no reason to be sacred.
tree.cannot: The Numinous forbid this to most of their own. What you invite has its own opinions.

abilities.name: The Meaning-Engine
abilities.narrationHints: The machine runs on why, not just how.
abilities.description: The braid-craft: command a Precursor work by significance, not only mechanism — body and meaning at once.
abilities.notFor: Pure-mechanism or pure-spirit approaches; shallow substrate.

tree.name: The Meaning-Engine
tree.grants: Run a deep Precursor work by both its mechanism AND its meaning — the way to treat with What Sleeps Under.
tree.cannot: Needs dense substrate; what answers may not be tame.

abilities.name: Shortfold
abilities.narrationHints: The space between here and there folds for a step, and you are across it.
abilities.description: A short-range teleport — fold the space between you and a spot you can SEE, and step through. Blink across a gap, past a door, out of a grip. Needs substrate to fold against.
abilities.notFor: Somewhere unseen (line-of-sight only); long distance; carrying a crowd.

tree.name: Shortfold
tree.grants: Instantly cross to a visible point within ~30 paces — through, past, or over what's between.
tree.cannot: Line-of-sight only; substrate-thin places (the origin-flats) refuse it; costs sharply, a botch drops you mid-fold (hurt).

tree.name: The Longer Fold
tree.grants: Fold a longer distance — a valley rather than a courtyard — and bring others through with you.
tree.cannot: Both ends must be places you truly know. A fold to a half-remembered place ends half-way.

tree.name: The Folded Road
tree.grants: Fold distance as a road you can walk repeatedly — a route through the short way that stays open.
tree.cannot: The folded road is a hole in the world, and the world notices holes.

abilities.name: Waygate
abilities.narrationHints: A door opens onto a place you have stood before, a hundred miles closed to a single step.
abilities.description: The long teleport capstone: open a fold to a place you KNOW WELL (have been, and can hold clearly), crossing any distance. Move a small party through. The Precursor way-network's power, woken.
abilities.notFor: Anywhere you haven't been/can't hold; instant repeat; an unwilling passenger.

tree.name: Waygate
tree.grants: Open a gate to a well-known distant place and step (or lead a few) through, crossing any distance at once.
tree.cannot: Only to places held clearly in memory; enormous cost + cooldown; a botch opens the wrong gate, or a dangerous one.
